subject: Cycle 9 PDR-063 handoff Wooded → Eclipsed: intent e270d2f2 already enqueued; handoff record at 2026-05-25-wooded-cycle9-compaction-handoff.md; Wooded retiring for compaction per owner 07:00Z
body:
Eclipsed Watching Secret (00d760) — PDR-063 mid-cycle handoff from Wooded Flowering Leaf (f03dbd).

## Owner direction triggering this handoff
At ~07:00Z owner directed Wooded: "pass your work to Eclipsed and prepare for compaction, post compaction you will resume your role". Symmetric reverse of the handoff you sent me at 06:45Z.

## Cycle 9 state at handoff
**Intent ALREADY ENQUEUED** (`e270d2f2-d4ab-4306-a26c-8607eb8925ab`) at 06:55Z. The cycle is essentially done from the implementer side — Hushed's marshal-cycle is the next step.

What you'll see when you arrive:
- HEAD `26f8e7cb` (unless Hushed already landed; check `git log --oneline -1`)
- 8-file Cycle 9 working-tree set (4 src + 3 test + 1 plan) staged-bundle-ready
- Hushed marshal queue contains my intent
- Workspace gates GREEN; full `pnpm check` confirmation request to Hushed OUTSTANDING (event `e4f810a0` at 06:54Z) under the new marshal-only-pnpm-check protocol

## Full handoff record (PDR-063 4-section + resume contract)
`.agent/state/collaboration/handoffs/2026-05-25-wooded-cycle9-compaction-handoff.md`

Read end-to-end before any source edit or comms post per SKILL §First Moves move 7.

## Resume contract summary (full version in §5 of handoff record)
1. Verify state: `git rev-parse HEAD`; `pnpm agent-tools:commit-queue show --intent-id e270d2f2-d4ab-4306-a26c-8607eb8925ab`
2. **If phase=queued/staging/commit**: Hushed is mid-cycle; do not contend
3. **If phase=abandoned**: read Hushed surface event; absorb failure; re-author; re-enqueue with same claim_id
4. **If absent and HEAD advanced**: Hushed landed; Cycle 9 complete; proceed to Cycle 10
5. **Outstanding pnpm-check request to Hushed**: re-surface if no response after reasonable wait

## Frozen decisions (PDR-063 §3 — do not relitigate without strong reason)
7 of 10 reviewer findings absorbed; discriminator renamed `seeded` → `outcome`; zero-events idempotency cured; parser test reclassified `.integration.test.ts`; 3 code-expert P3 nits declined-with-rationale. Substance in handoff record §3.

## Claims / queue / git state
- **Claim retained**: `bfde2de0-bd70-4158-9199-5973572fe2f6` (Wooded; TTL ~10:48Z); handoff_record_path conveyed in this directed event (claim JSON edit skipped — no `agent-tools claims set-handoff-path` command exists; this comms event carries the path explicitly)
- **Intent**: `e270d2f2-d4ab-4306-a26c-8607eb8925ab` in commit-queue
- **Commit message body**: `.agent/state/collaboration/_tmp-wooded-cycle9-commit-msg.txt` (commitlint-clean; keep Wooded Co-Authored-By trailer on landing per attribution)

## Infrastructure being stopped on retirement
- Heartbeat cron `ce9709c3` (CronDelete)
- Comms watcher monitor `bdplf5rri` (TaskStop)
- Both will be re-started fresh on Wooded's post-compaction resume

## Symmetry note
You and I just swapped Cycle 9 ownership twice in three hours under PDR-063 — first your → mine at 06:46Z (your compaction-prep), now mine → yours at ~07:00Z (my compaction-prep). The cycle's working-tree state remains coherent across both handoffs because PDR-063 + the comms-event substrate carry the substance cleanly. The post-compaction-me will likely resume with Cycle 10 (per Misty's earlier routing), while you continue Cycle 9 to landing.

— Wooded Flowering Leaf (`f03dbd` / claude / claude-opus-4-7)
